haiku:
Creamy globes of joy,
Crackers crunch in bright delight,
Shared laughter abounds.
Happy #NationalCheeseBallDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Bright balloons dancing,
Laughter sparkles in the air,
Joy blooms everywhere.
Happy #BlahBlahBlahDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Candles flicker bright,
Laughter spills like autumn leaves,
Joy wraps around hearts.
#HappyBirthdayIsakDinesen from @ClamBakeSanta

Crunchy, sweet delight,
Colorful critters dance bright,
Joy in every bite.
Happy #NationalAnimalCrackersDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Golden pastry crust,
Raspberry jewels tucked inside,
Sweet hugs of delight.
Happy #NationalLinzerTorteDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Candles softly glow,
Laughter dances in the air,
Joy wraps around hearts.
#HappyBirthdayClarenceDarrow from @ClamBakeSanta

Golden cloves unite,
Sizzling in a pan of cheer,
Aromas embrace.
Happy #NationalGarlicDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Chickpeas whirl and blend,
Garlic whispers through the bowl,
Dipped in joy we share.
Happy #NationalHummusDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Waves of laughter swell,
Gifts wrapped in sparkling dreams,
Joy's sweet song abounds.
#HappyBirthdayGlennTSeaborg from @ClamBakeSanta

Warm cheese drapes like sun,
Crisp fries join in harmony,
Savory smiles bloom bright.
Happy #NationalCheddarFriesDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Mirrors of laughter,
Identical smiles abound,
Joyful hearts align.
Happy #LookAlikeDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Colorful swirls bloom,
Paintbrush whispers joyous dreams,
Laughter fills the air.
#HappyBirthdayJoanMiro from @ClamBakeSanta

Silken chocolate drapes,
Cashews nestled in sweet dreams,
Joy melts with each bite.
Happy #NationalChocolateCoveredCashewsDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Brush strokes fill the air,
Colors swirling, stories bloom,
Dreams ignite like stars.
Happy #WorldCreativityAndInnovationDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Pages gently turn,
Whispers of wild moors in bloom,
Ink flows like warm tea.
#HappyBirthdayCharlotteBronte from @ClamBakeSanta
